hero.title: The Lighthouse
hero.subtitle: Where culinary artistry meets timeless elegance

about.title: A Legacy of Flavor
about.text_1: For over three decades, The Lighthouse has been a beacon of culinary excellence. Our chef combines classical techniques with modern innovation, sourcing only the finest seasonal ingredients from local farms and trusted suppliers.
about.text_2: Every dish tells a story, every meal creates a memory. We invite you to experience the art of fine dining in an atmosphere of warmth and sophistication.

menu.label: Culinary Offerings
menu.title: Our Menu
menu.diet_no_results: No items match this diet preference

chicken_keema_dosa.name: Chicken Keema Dosa
chicken_keema_dosa.desc: Crispy dosa stuffed with spicy chicken keema masala
chicken_keema_dosa.notes: Crispy golden dosa generously stuffed with spicy minced chicken masala, perfectly seasoned with aromatic spices and herbs.
chicken_keema_dosa.ingredients: Chicken, Rice Batter, Onion, Ginger, Garlic, Spices

paneer_butter_masala.name: Paneer Butter Masala
paneer_butter_masala.desc: Rich creamy paneer curry served with butter naan
paneer_butter_masala.notes: Rich and creamy paneer curry cooked in a buttery tomato gravy with a blend of aromatic spices. Best enjoyed with butter naan.
paneer_butter_masala.ingredients: Paneer, Tomato, Butter, Cream, Kasuri Methi

masala_dosa.name: Masala Dosa
masala_dosa.notes: Golden crispy dosa made from fermented rice and lentil batter, filled with spiced potato masala. Served with fresh coconut chutney and sambar.
masala_dosa.ingredients: Rice, Urad Dal, Potato, Onion, Curry Leaves

idli_sambar.name: Idli Sambar
idli_sambar.notes: Soft, fluffy steamed idlis made from fermented rice and urad dal, served with hot, flavorful sambar and fresh coconut chutney.
idli_sambar.ingredients: Rice, Urad Dal, Toor Dal, Vegetables, Coconut

hyderabadi_chicken_biryani.name: Hyderabadi Chicken Biryani
hyderabadi_chicken_biryani.notes: Fragrant dum biryani layered with tender chicken, basmati rice, and a secret blend of authentic Hyderabad spices. Slow-cooked to perfection.
hyderabadi_chicken_biryani.ingredients: Chicken, Basmati Rice, Saffron, Mint, Fried Onions

butter_chicken.name: Butter Chicken
butter_chicken.notes: Succulent chicken cooked in a creamy tomato-based gravy with butter and aromatic spices. A timeless classic served with naan.
butter_chicken.ingredients: Chicken, Tomato, Butter, Cream, Kasuri Methi

mango_lassi.name: Mango Lassi
mango_lassi.notes: Chilled, creamy yogurt drink blended with sweet mango pulp. Perfectly balanced with a hint of cardamom.

masala_chai.name: Masala Chai
masala_chai.notes: Traditional Indian tea brewed with a blend of aromatic spices — cardamom, ginger, cinnamon, and cloves. Perfect for any time of day.

fresh_lime_soda.name: Fresh Lime Soda
fresh_lime_soda.notes: Fizzy lime soda available in sweet, salted, or mixed style. The perfect thirst-quencher on a warm day.

gulab_jamun.name: Gulab Jamun
gulab_jamun.notes: Soft, spongy milk-solid dumplings fried to golden perfection and soaked in warm, fragrant sugar syrup with cardamom and rose water.
gulab_jamun.ingredients: Milk Solids, Sugar, Cardamom, Rose Water

rasmalai.name: Rasmalai
rasmalai.notes: Soft, melt-in-your-mouth paneer discs soaked in creamy, saffron-infused reduced milk. Garnished with pistachios.

kesar_pista_kulfi.name: Kesar Pista Kulfi
kesar_pista_kulfi.notes: Rich, creamy Indian ice cream infused with saffron and loaded with crunchy pistachios. A royal treat to end your meal.

reservation.label: Reservations
reservation.title: Book Your Table
reservation.text: We look forward to welcoming you to The Lighthouse. Reserve your table for an unforgettable dining experience.
reservation.address_text: 123 Harbor View Drive, Coastal City, CA 90210

reservation.note: We'll confirm your reservation within 24 hours.

reviews.label: Guest Reviews
reviews.title: What Our Guests Say
reviews.pinned_review_text: An absolutely magical dining experience! The ambiance, the service, and most importantly the food - everything was impeccable. The chef's tasting menu is a journey through culinary excellence. Will definitely be coming back!
reviews.name_error: Please enter a valid name (3-30 characters, letters only)
